Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini.

Based on gpt-5-mini's correct combination of description and amount, overriding 'Brought fwd' to 'Brought up' after visual verification. gemini-flash incorrectly split this into two rows and invented an amount for 'Braine Robey' (0/18/0) which does not exist as a separate entry.
Selected gemini-flash for correct value and description. gpt-5-mini incorrectly put 15 in pounds column and misread 'Hodor' as 'Hobor'.
Selected gemini-flash for correct value. gpt-5-mini incorrectly put 16 in pounds column.
Selected gemini-flash for correct value. gpt-5-mini had incorrect pounds and shillings values.
Selected gemini-flash for correct value, combined with gpt-5-mini's slightly better description for 'Comm:n'. gpt-5-mini had incorrect pounds and shillings values.

rows.description: Whitehead Repair of Walls, Moor Lane
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for correct value and description. gpt-5-mini had incorrect pounds and shillings values and misread 'Lane' as 'land'.
Selected gemini-flash for correct value and description. gpt-5-mini had incorrect pounds and pence values and misread 'Quit' as 'Lieut'.
Selected gemini-flash for correct value. gpt-5-mini had completely incorrect values.
Selected gemini-flash for correct value and description. gpt-5-mini misread the name 'Hughes' as 'Hayles' and had incorrect values (20/0/0 instead of 5/2/0).
Selected gemini-flash for correct value. gpt-5-mini had an incorrect pounds value (1 instead of 20).
Selected gemini-flash for correct value and description. gpt-5-mini missed this row entirely and conflated it with the 'Denny Inn Bill' entry.
Selected gemini-flash for correct value and description. gpt-5-mini had correct values but an incorrect description ('Denny Pipes') due to its earlier row omission/conflation.
Selected gemini-flash for correct value and better description ('Comm:n' vs 'Im Bill', 'Gwynnear' vs 'Gwypnear').
Selected gpt-5-mini's description 'Comm:n' (more accurate than gemini-flash's 'Comm:') and both models' correct values.
Combined gpt-5-mini's correct description 'Stamps &' with gemini-flash's correct values. gemini-flash misread 'Stamps' as 'Lamps' and gpt-5-mini had incorrect values (1/6/0 instead of 0/7/0).
Selected gemini-flash for correct value and description. gpt-5-mini misread 'Kimber' as 'Timber' and had incorrect values (10/0/0 instead of 0/16/0).
Selected gemini-flash for correct value and description. gpt-5-mini incorrectly placed 15 in the pounds column and was uncertain about pence, which is clearly 6.
Selected gemini-flash for correct value. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read shillings as 13.
Selected gemini-flash for correct value and description. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read shillings as 12.
Consensus on values. Used gemini-flash's combined description. Both models correct on amounts.
Selected gemini-flash for correct value and description. Visual verification confirms 'Thatching' (not 'Hatching') and the 1/2 fraction is clearly present.
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini.
Selected gemini-flash for correct value and description. gpt-5-mini misread the pounds (empty) and shillings (12) values.
Selected gemini-flash for correct value and description. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read values (empty pounds, 13 shillings) and had plural 'Rents'.
Selected gpt-5-mini's 'header' row_type as more appropriate for this descriptive section title. Both models correctly identified no amounts.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms '8000' is part of the description text and not in the amount columns. 'L Jews' is also correct. gpt-5-mini incorrectly extracted 8000 to the pounds column and misread 'L Jews' as 'Law'.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms '256.5.8' is part of the description text and not in the amount columns. 'Rd 3 per cent' is also correct. gpt-5-mini incorrectly extracted values to the columns and misread 'Rd' as 'Red'.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms '858.12.4' is part of the description text and not in the amount columns. 'Advanced' is also correct. gpt-5-mini incorrectly extracted values to the columns and misread 'Advanced' as 'Assumed'.
Added missing row identified by gemini-flash, which correctly extracted the sub-total for the Kidlington Estate section. gpt-5-mini missed this row.
Used gemini-flash's more accurate description. Both models correctly extracted the columnar amounts. Visual verification confirms '£97' and '£4' in description.
